image:image.image:title: Kevin Liu's PortfolioMon Showdown — Interactive Developer Portfolio | Princeton CS '28
image:image.image:caption: Interactive Pokémon Showdown-inspired developer portfolio by Kevin Liu (Princeton University CS '28, @kevskgs) featuring 30+ projects as battle-ready PortfolioMons. Kevin Liu has worked at Amazon, Bloomberg, AT&T Labs, and Dedalus Labs (Y Combinator S25).
